evidence_summary: To demonstrate Carter's physical prowess and resourcefulness through a high-stakes infiltration.
Carter performs a perilous climb up the thousand-foot Zodanga barracks using a grappling hook. He reaches the roof, neutralizes a sentry, and secures two air machines for his escape.
Extreme wide shots to show scale/height
tight action coverage of the sentry neutralization.
